title: Audit by legislative auditor
doc_html:
§1142.  Audit by legislative auditor

All transactions shall be subject to audit by the legislative auditor.  

Acts 1988, No. 54, §1.
doc_text:
§1142.  Audit by legislative auditor
All transactions shall be subject to audit by the legislative auditor.
Acts 1988, No. 54, §1.
